overview: A professional coaching website for Rafi Sir – IDT Guru, a commerce educator specializing in GST, Customs, and FTP. Features a full content management system, password-protected admin panel, image uploads, email notifications for new enquiries, and complete control over all website content.
features: Full CMS to edit all website content including prices
Image uploads for hero, profile, and book covers
Email notifications to rafigowsi@gmail.com on new enquiries
Enquiry filtering and sorting by course, date, and name
Instant live updates when admin makes changes
